message:
Atomicize model/thinking-level management with session header sync and deduplication

Comprehensive overhaul of model switching and thinking level handling across the
agent, session, SDK, and interactive layers to ensure atomicity, correctness,
and history cleanliness:

Model Switching Atomicity (src/agent.rs):
- Rewrite set_provider_model() with two-phase validation: check already-active
  (early exit), then validate credentials only if actually switching
- New clamp_thinking_level_for_model() helper looks up model entry and clamps
  requested thinking level to model's actual capabilities
- New sync_runtime_selection_from_session_header() restores runtime model and
  thinking level from persisted session header on agent initialization

Thinking Level Clamping (src/sdk.rs, src/interactive/ext_session.rs):
- set_thinking_level() now clamps to model capabilities (non-reasoning → "off")
- Only appends thinking_level_change history if effective level differs
- Only persists session if actual change occurred

History Deduplication (src/session.rs, src/interactive/ext_session.rs):
- set_model() only records model_change if provider or model_id actually differs
- set_thinking_level() only records thinking_level_change if level differs
- Prevents redundant history entries from rapid model selector interactions

Session Header Sync (src/interactive/agent.rs, commands.rs, keybindings.rs):
- Three new sync points before agent work: submit_continue(), submit_reply(),
  submit_file_edit() all call sync_runtime_selection_from_session_header()
- Ensures runtime state matches persisted session before each agent invocation
- New sync methods in commands.rs and keybindings.rs with full test coverage:
  clamp+dedupe tests, missing credentials rejection, thinking level update

Interactive Layer (src/interactive/model_selector_ui.rs):
- switch_active_model() signature updated to borrow &str instead of owned String

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
